title: The Lean Startup
author: Eric Ries
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- The Build-Measure-Learn feedback loop: three nodes connected by arrows, the cycle in red. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1100)" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.08em">
    <!-- Three hollow circles arranged in a triangle -->
    <circle cx="-340" cy="-200" r="120" fill="none" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
    <text x="-340" y="-190" text-anchor="middle" font-size="22" fill="#cccccc">BUILD</text>
    <text x="-340" y="-160" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#4c4c4c">product</text>

    <circle cx="340" cy="-200" r="120" fill="none" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
    <text x="340" y="-190" text-anchor="middle" font-size="22" fill="#cccccc">MEASURE</text>
    <text x="340" y="-160" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#4c4c4c">data</text>

    <circle cx="0" cy="280" r="120" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2"/>
    <text x="0" y="290" text-anchor="middle" font-size="22" fill="#fc1c46">LEARN</text>
    <text x="0" y="320" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#fc1c46" opacity="0.7">pivot or persevere</text>

    <!-- Arrows forming the loop: BUILD -> MEASURE -> LEARN -> BUILD (red for the Learn->Build feedback) -->
    <!-- BUILD -> MEASURE (top) -->
    <path d="M-220 -200 L220 -200" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <polygon points="220,-200 200,-210 200,-190" fill="#4c4c4c"/>
    <!-- MEASURE -> LEARN (right diagonal) -->
    <path d="M280 -90 L100 200" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <polygon points="100,200 80,180 120,170" fill="#4c4c4c"/>
    <!-- LEARN -> BUILD (left diagonal, RED — the critical feedback) -->
    <path d="M-100 200 L-280 -90" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2"/>
    <polygon points="-280,-90 -260,-70 -300,-70" fill="#fc1c46"/>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: The Build-Measure-Learn feedback loop is the entire book. Three hollow nodes arranged in a triangle, with the LEARN→BUILD return arrow in red — the book's pivotal insight (the learning must circle back). 360px command-weight title 'Lean Startup' at the bottom; subline 'Build. Measure. Learn. Repeat.' caps the loop. Single red = the critical feedback path.
